message.abstract:
<jats:p>
                  Italy is currently experiencing an epidemic of COVID-19 which emerged in the Lombardy region
                  <jats:sup>1</jats:sup>
                  . During the interval between February 25-29, 2020, we identified 46 cases of COVID-19 reported in 21 countries in Europe, Africa, North America, and South America which were either in individuals with recent travel from Italy, or who had presumed infection by a traveler from Italy
                  <jats:sup>2</jats:sup>
                  . In six cases, in four of the affected countries (Switzerland, France, Austria, Croatia), land travel was a likely route of introduction, or was documented to have been the route of introduction
                  <jats:sup>2</jats:sup>
                  .
                </jats:p>
title: Estimation of COVID-19 outbreak size in Italy based on international case exportations
